message:
chore(artifacts): refresh E2E results, golden journeys, CI manifest, and unit test logs

Regenerate all test artifact outputs to reflect the expanded primitive
set and updated AD/egraph/cache/dispatch logic. This includes:

- E2E scenario results for p2c001-p2c004 test packs covering dispatch
  pipelines, IR determinism, staging roundtrips, and transform composition
- Golden journey snapshots (gj_01 through gj_08) updated for new
  transform and cache behavior
- CI synthetic forensics manifest with current run metadata
- Unit test logs for fj-core (fingerprinting, tensor ops, transform
  composition including new double-grad/double-vmap cases),
  fj-interpreters (partial eval, DCE, staging), and fj-trace (shape
  inference, trace-to-jaxpr validation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
